meta.title: Istanbul Airport Transfer (IST & SAW) · Fixed Price · time4transfer
meta.description: Fixed-price private transfers from Istanbul Airport (IST) and Sabiha Gökçen (SAW) to anywhere in the city. Standard & Premium Mercedes Vito and Sprinter. Pay online or directly to your driver.

hero.subtitle: Fixed-price chauffeur transfers from both Istanbul airports — IST and Sabiha Gökçen. Mercedes Vito and Sprinter, English-speaking drivers, and a meet-and-greet that turns travel into hospitality.

booking.title: Plan your transfer
booking.subtitle: Get a fixed quote in seconds — no card required.
booking.estimateNote: Fixed flat rate — tolls, taxes and meet-and-greet included. No surge.
booking.serviceArea: We currently serve transfers to or from Istanbul Airport (IST) and Sabiha Gökçen (SAW). Pick one as pickup or drop-off.
booking.capacityWarn: Too many passengers for this vehicle. Choose a Sprinter for groups of 7+.
booking.payChoiceHint: Choose at checkout — cash, card, or transfer.
booking.whatsappHint: We'll reply on this number — include country code
booking.payToDriverNote: Cash or card to the driver — no online payment, no card on file. You only pay once we've met you.
booking.submitNote: Opens WhatsApp with your booking pre-filled. A human replies within minutes.
booking.successBody: Your booking opened in WhatsApp. Send the message and our team will confirm within minutes.
booking.needRoute: Add a pickup and drop-off to see your route.

vitoStandard.name: Standard Vito
vitoStandard.blurb: Mercedes Vito with comfortable bench seating. The everyday workhorse for families and small groups.

vitoPremium.name: Premium Vito
vitoPremium.tag: Up to 4 passengers · VIP captain seats
vitoPremium.blurb: Mercedes Vito in VIP layout — captain seats, extra legroom, privacy glass. Four guests, business-class comfort.

sprinterStandard.name: Standard Sprinter
sprinterStandard.blurb: Mercedes Sprinter for larger groups. Ample luggage room, climate zones, easy boarding.

sprinterPremium.name: Premium Sprinter
sprinterPremium.blurb: Sprinter with premium upholstery, mood lighting and refreshments. Group travel without compromise.

support.title: 24/7 human support
support.body: Real people on WhatsApp, phone and email — in English, Russian, German and Turkish.

fixed.title: Fixed prices, no surprises
fixed.body: The price you see is the price you pay. Tolls, taxes and meet-and-greet included.

payDriver.title: Zero-risk payment
payDriver.body: Pay online if you want certainty, or settle directly with your driver on arrival.

free.title: Free cancellation
free.body: Plans change. Cancel up to 24 hours before pickup at no cost, ever.

how.title: Booked in under a minute
how.subtitle: Three steps from landing to your hotel lobby.

step1.title: Tell us where
step1.body: Pick your route, date and the vehicle that fits your party.

step2.title: Confirm your driver
step2.body: We assign a vetted English-speaking driver and send you their details.

step3.title: Step off the plane
step3.body: Your driver is waiting in arrivals with a name sign and a bottle of water.

payDriver.title: Pay only when you've met your driver
payDriver.body: We don't ask for a card upfront. Reserve in 30 seconds, meet your chauffeur on arrival, then pay — cash, card or transfer. Online pre-payment is there if you prefer it.
payDriver.bullet2: Free cancellation up to 24h before pickup

routes.title: Popular Istanbul routes
routes.subtitle: Every-day journeys with our Standard Vito — fixed prices, no surprises.

items.quote: Driver was waiting before we even cleared customs at IST. The Sprinter felt like a private lounge after a long flight.
items.name: Sophia M.

items.quote: Booked at 2am the night before. Confirmed in minutes, fixed price, paid the driver in cash at Sabiha Gökçen. Exactly what I needed.
items.name: Daniel K.

items.quote: Russian-speaking driver, spotless Vito, helped with the kids' bags right at arrivals. We use time4transfer every time we land in Istanbul.
items.name: Irina V.

items.q: What happens if my flight is delayed?
items.a: We track your flight automatically. Your driver adjusts pickup to the real landing time, with up to 60 minutes of free waiting included.

items.q: Can I pay the driver in cash?
items.a: Yes — that's our zero-risk option. You can pay in euro, US dollar, British pound or Turkish lira. Card on arrival is also fine.
Baby, toddler and booster seats are free of charge. Just add them when you book.

items.q: Do you operate outside the main tourist airports?
items.a: Yes. We cover every commercial airport in Turkey, plus port pickups and intercity transfers.

items.q: What if I need to cancel?
items.a: Free cancellation up to 24 hours before pickup. After that, we ask for a 50% fee to cover the driver's reserved time.
